description: Evolution feedback loop — maps 5+1 structural learning dimensions to their operational targets. Governs how Evolution Stage 8 outputs close the loop back into the system.

patternReuse.evidence: ≥3 occurrences of the same pattern across different tasks

boundaryDrift.evidence: Stew-All or Shattered death pattern detected

rhythmBottleneck.evidence: ≥3 consecutive high-cost card plays without pause

capabilityGap.evidence: Fetch returned 0 matches for a required capability

processBottleneck.evidence: Review gate consistently fails at the same stage

patternReuse.description: Minimum pattern occurrences to trigger extraction as skill

soulSize.description: SOUL.md size thresholds for Stew-All risk detection

boundaryDrift.description: Maximum unrelated domains before triggering Type B pipeline

rhythmBottleneck.description: Consecutive high-cost cards triggering workflow optimization

gitAnalysis.description: Default git commit range for evolution signal detection

signalAggregation.description: Minimum pattern count for signal aggregation

low.description: Pattern extraction with all validations passing

medium.description: Boundary refinement with user confirmation required

high.description: Boundary expansion/merger requiring Type B pipeline

critical.description: Core Truths modification requiring dual review

selfEvolutionBlock.reason: Chrysalis cannot evolve itself - recursive loop risk

circularDependency.reason: A needs B, B needs A - circular evolution risk

thresholdGaming.reason: Multiple small writebacks to same agent should be reviewed as one

identityDrift.reason: Proposed change violates Core Truths - identity drift risk

independent.description: Agent produces output without requiring other meta agents' outputs

smallEnough.description: Agent covers exactly one responsibility class

clearBoundaries.description: Own and Do Not Touch lists reference specific other agents

replaceable.description: Other agents can continue operating if this agent is absent

reusable.description: Agent is triggered by a recurring condition

prinSt01.name: Configurable
prinSt01.description: Behavior driven through configuration, not hardcoded values

prinSt02.name: Single Source
prinSt02.description: Each piece of data or logic has exactly one authoritative source

prinSt03.name: Layering
prinSt03.description: Each layer owns one responsibility class

prinSt04.name: Decoupling
prinSt04.description: Modules communicate through explicit interfaces, not implementation details

prinSt05.name: i18n
prinSt05.description: User-facing text externalized, not inline human-language strings
